name: Lightpanda
description: Lightpanda Cloud HTTP API for rendering JavaScript-heavy webpages and returning agent-ready markdown or rendered HTML. This integration covers the documented HTTP fetch API; interactive browsing, clicks, and form filling require Lightpanda's separate CDP WebSocket interface.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Lightpanda Cloud token created in the Lightpanda console.

credential_fields.name: region
credential_fields.label: Cloud Region
credential_fields.description: Lightpanda Cloud region prefix: euwest for Europe or uswest for the United States.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Render one URL with Lightpanda and return the resulting HTML or markdown. Prefer output_format='markdown' for agent reading. Set raw=false for the structured response containing data, upstream status, and headers; raw=true returns only the rendered content. This endpoint is stateless and cannot click, fill forms, or preserve a browser session.

url.description: Public HTTP or HTTPS URL to render.

output_format.description: Rendered page format. Use markdown to minimize agent context usage.

wait_ms.description: Additional time to wait before retrieving the rendered page, in milliseconds.

wait_event.description: Page lifecycle event to wait for before returning content.

raw.description: Return only the HTML or markdown string instead of the structured JSON wrapper.

proxy_name.description: Lightpanda outbound proxy pool. datacenter supports country targeting.

country.description: Optional two-letter country code used only with proxy_name='datacenter', for example de, fr, es, or us.

mock_response.data:
# Example Domain

This domain is for use in documentation examples.
